Analysis: xgboost will likely improve regression on Morgan FPs (boosting > RF/MLP for tabular); install is allowed and will enable current files. FP computation loop is slow but acceptable within budget. Decision: Install xgboost, run existing train.py (n_est=300,depth=9,lr=0.1) on full data to get improved baseline MAE + timing, then submit_eval immediately.
